title: Modeling Cycles, Units, Error, and Uncertainty · Mixed Practice Return
summary: Evaluate demand and capacity for a public program using incomplete measurements. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a validated demand-capacity model after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Turn stakeholder needs into answerable model questions, quantities, constraints, and validation criteria.
Track units, scales, significant digits, and uncertainty through multi-stage calculations.
Estimate how measurement and rounding error affect a computed result.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
